title: [LLHD] Segmentation fault in Desequentialization Pass
body:
Hi! I found some code that leads to segfault in `llhd-desequentialize` pass. Is it related to TODO or FIXME in realization? Do you have any ideas how to fix that? I can try to do this.

```bash
circt-verilog always_many_bits.sv | circt-opt --llhd-early-code-motion --llhd-temporal-code-motion --llhd-desequentialize
```
```verilog
module Mod(input [1:0] a, input c, output logic b);
always @(c)
    b <= a[0];
endmodule
```
